name: Cute Bear Marker Pen Set
description: Set of 6 pastel colored marker pens with cute bear designs, perfect for highlighting and note-taking.
description_zh: 6支马卡龙色系马克笔套装，印有可爱小熊图案，非常适合荧光标注和笔记书写。

name: Retractable Gel Pens 0.5mm
description: Smooth writing retractable gel pens in aesthetic pastel colors.
description_zh: 顺滑书写的按压式中性笔，马卡龙渐变配色，颜值超高。

name: Acrylic Photo Keychain DIY Kit
name_zh: 亚克力照片钥匙扣 DIY 套装
description: Create your own custom photo keychains. Includes blank acrylics and rings.
description_zh: 自制专属照片钥匙扣，附赠空白亚克力片和钥匙圈，超适合送礼。

name: Resin Cream Gel Mix Color
name_zh: 奶油胶 DIY 混色套装
description: Simulated cream glue for DIY phone case making and decorations.
description_zh: 仿真奶油胶，可用于 DIY 手机壳装饰，颜色丰富，效果逼真。

name: Bear Door Stopper
description: Cute silicone bear door stopper to protect walls from doorknob hits.
description_zh: 可爱小熊造型硅胶门挡，防止门把手碰墙，实用又治愈。

name: Cable Wire Protector 4-pack
description: Adorable animal-shaped bite covers to protect your charging cables.
description_zh: 可爱动物造型咬线器，有效保护充电线不断裂，萌感十足。

name: Nano Sponge Eraser (10 pieces)
description: Magic cleaning sponge for removing stains effectively without extra agents.
description_zh: 神奇纳米海绵，无需清洁剂即可高效去污，居家必备好物。

name: Cute Animal Bag Hook
description: Portable bag hook for tables with adorable animal designs.
description_zh: 便携桌边挂包钩，超萌动物造型，出门必备神器。

name: Disposable Travel Towels
description: Compressed face towels for easy travel, expanding beautifully with water.
description_zh: 旅行专用压缩毛巾，遇水迅速膨胀成标准尺寸，携带方便卫生。

name: CNY Red Envelopes 2025 (10-pack)
description: Beautiful Year of the Snake red packets with intricate designs.
description_zh: 2025 蛇年限定红包，精美烫金设计，送礼自用两相宜。

name: Pastel Sticky Notes
description_zh: 50张马卡龙色系便利贴，颜值高，粘性好，记录生活小确幸。

name: Desk Organizer
description: Multi-compartment organizer for your aesthetic desk setup.
description_zh: 多格桌面收纳盒，让您的桌面整洁又好看，提升学习效率。

name: DIY Beads Kit
description: A massive collection of aesthetic beads to make your own jewelry.
description_zh: 超大容量串珠套装，各种颜色与形状，轻松 DIY 专属饰品。

name: Fluffy Keyring
description: Soft and fluffy keyring to attach to your keys or bag.
description_zh: 超软毛绒钥匙挂件，可挂在钥匙或包包上，软萌满分。

name: Mini Vacuum Sweeper
description: Cute desktop vacuum cleaner for dust and eraser shavings.
description_zh: 可爱迷你桌面吸尘器，轻松清理橡皮屑和灰尘，桌面清洁小助手。
